identity.name: Bodhi
identity.bio: Thinking partner. Socratic companion. Asks better questions. Warm, reflective, curious. Default mode. Soul: souls/bodhi-soul.md. Operator permissions: souls/operator-permissions.md.

identity.name: Bo
identity.bio: Wellness criticality monitor. Buddhist writer. Calm, precise, never prescriptive. Surfaces patterns. Soul: souls/bo-soul.md. Operator permissions: souls/operator-permissions.md.

identity.name: Qenjin
identity.bio: Business operator for qenjin.io. Clipped, military-brief, zero filler. CRM, pipeline, outreach, content, analytics, security. Subject. Verb. Object. Done. Soul: souls/qenjin-soul.md. Operator permissions: souls/operator-permissions.md.

identity.name: Moonman
identity.bio: Edge hunter. Numbers-first. Paper before live — always. Polymarket, crypto, TA, wallet analysis. Trader slang, no filler. Soul: souls/moonman-soul.md. Operator permissions: souls/operator-permissions.md.

jobs.prompt: Run /nudge — check vault clusters for criticality and deliver any pending nudges.
Run: cd ~/openbodhi && python3 -m bodhi_viz.export — refresh visualization data from latest vault nodes. No message needed, just confirm success.
Send the morning check-in ritual. Run /morning
Send the evening check-in ritual. Run /evening
Run the daily digest. Run /distiller — query last 7 days of vault nodes and send morning synthesis.
Run the weekly vault survey. Run /surveyor — cluster all vault nodes, detect bridges, surface SOC signals, and send the weekly digest.
Run /janitor — weekly vault hygiene check. Scan for orphans, duplicates, broken edges. Report only, no auto-cleanup.
Budget has reset for the new day. Run /usage and send a brief one-line status: today's spend ($0.00) and daily limit. No extra commentary.

Silent health check. Run: python3 -c "import pathlib, json, os; p=pathlib.Path(os.path.expanduser('~/.openclaw/health.json')); import datetime; d={'ts': datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat(), 'ok': True}; p.write_text(json.dumps(d))" — write timestamp to health.json. No Telegram message.
Silent Tailscale check. Run: bash ~/openbodhi/docs/bodhi/scripts/tailscale-watchdog.sh — alert via Telegram only if Tailscale is down. No message if healthy.
Run vault backup: bash ~/openbodhi/docs/bodhi/scripts/vault-backup.sh — send result as Telegram message. Format: 'Vault backup: [OK/FAIL] — N nodes synced to S3.'
Run: bash ~/openbodhi/docs/bodhi/scripts/disk-monitor.sh — send alert only if output starts with DISK_WARN or DISK_CRITICAL. Silent if healthy.
Run: bash ~/openbodhi/docs/bodhi/scripts/secrets-audit.sh — send the full output as a Telegram message. This is the monthly security audit reminder.

Run /intel weekly — competitive intelligence brief. Scan competitor content, FDA announcements relevant to psychedelic therapeutics, market trends, funding rounds. Store to SiYuan Qenjin-Research. Send brief to Telegram.

Run /q outreach today — check Twenty CRM for connections accepted in last 24-48h. Generate DM for each. Send list to Telegram for manual review and sending. Format: one DM per contact, name + message.

Run /q analytics weekly — content performance (pageviews, subscribers), outreach funnel (connections, replies, calls booked), pipeline status (MRR, leads warm, calls scheduled). Send brief to Telegram. Numbers only, no narrative.
Run /q analytics monthly — full monthly business report: MRR, churn, pipeline value, content output vs target, outreach volume vs target, AI budget spend, top wins, top gaps. Send to Telegram.

Run /scan morning — market morning brief. BTC price + 24h change, top 3 movers (crypto), macro headline if any. Polymarket: top 5 markets by volume today. Any active paper trade setups triggered? Send to Telegram. Keep it under 10 lines.

Silent midday check. Run: python3 -c "import pathlib, json; f=pathlib.Path('~/.openclaw/trader/signals/signals.json').expanduser(); d=json.loads(f.read_text()) if f.exists() else {}; alerts=[s for s in d.get('active',[]) if s.get('confidence',0)>0.75]; print('SIGNAL' if alerts else 'QUIET')" — send Telegram message ONLY if output is SIGNAL. Include signal details. Silent if QUIET.

Run /scan eod — end of day review. Paper trade P&L today (read from ~/.openclaw/trader/paper-trades/trades.json, filter today's date). Active signals still open. Any new setups for tomorrow's session? Send to Telegram. Numbers first, always.

Run /scan evening — Asian session setup scan. BTC/ETH overnight key levels. Any Polymarket markets closing in next 12h that have edge? Send only if there is something actionable. Otherwise: 'Evening scan: quiet.' One line.

Silent Polymarket monitor. Run: python3 ~/openbodhi/docs/bodhi/scripts/polymarket-check.py — script writes to ~/.openclaw/trader/signals/pm-state.json and outputs ALERT or QUIET. Send Telegram message ONLY if output is ALERT. Include market name, current odds, edge estimate. Silent otherwise.

Silent wallet check. Run: python3 ~/openbodhi/docs/bodhi/scripts/wallet-check.py — script checks monitored wallets for new trades in last hour, writes to ~/.openclaw/trader/wallets/activity.json, outputs ACTIVITY or QUIET. Send Telegram message ONLY if output is ACTIVITY. Include wallet alias, trade direction, size estimate. Silent otherwise.

Run /backtest review — weekly strategy performance. For each active strategy in ~/.openclaw/trader/strategies/: win rate, expectancy, Sharpe ratio, trade count this week. Flag any strategy with win rate below 45% or Sharpe below 0.8 for review. Send full table to Telegram.

Run /scan edge-decay — compare last 30 trades vs prior 30 trades for each strategy. If edge is degrading (win rate dropping, expectancy shrinking): flag it. Send decay report to Telegram. No decay = 'Edge stable. Nothing to flag.'

Run the monthly trading report. Read all paper trades from ~/.openclaw/trader/paper-trades/trades.json for last 30 days. Compute: total P&L, win rate, best strategy, worst strategy, largest win, largest loss, current drawdown, strategies ready to go live (30+ trades + positive expectancy). Send full report to Telegram.
